description: KM: SQL Server Permissions (Users, Roles, Securables)
body:
/**********************************************************************************************************************
** PowerShell to find the name of the server you're currently on:
    hostname

** PowerShell to check if the currently logged-in user is a member of a specific group:
    whoami /groups | Where-Object {$_ -match "[DOMAIN\GROUPNAME]"}

** PowerShell to find information like the groups and privileges you belong to:
    whoami /all

** PowerShell to check if SQL Server port is open on a server:
    Test-NetConnection -ComputerName "[MySQLServerName]" -Port 1433

** PowerShell to check if an account has permisions to a network share:
    net use "[\\MyComputerName\MyShareName]" /user:[MyDomain\MyUserName] [MyPa$$word* | or * to prompt for password]; net use "[\\MyComputerName\MyShareName]" /delete
**********************************************************************************************************************/

/* General Information */
SELECT
    ServerName       = @@SERVERNAME
   ,DatabaseUserName = USER_NAME()
   ,LoginName        = SUSER_NAME()
   ,[Is sysadmin]    = IIF(IS_SRVROLEMEMBER('sysadmin') = 1, 'True', 'False');
GO


/* My Server Roles */
SELECT
    ServerRole = SLR.name
FROM
    master.sys.server_role_members      AS SRM
INNER JOIN master.sys.server_principals AS SP ON SRM.member_principal_id = SP.principal_id
INNER JOIN master.sys.server_principals AS SLR ON SRM.role_principal_id  = SLR.principal_id
WHERE
    SP.name = SUSER_NAME()
ORDER BY
    SP.name
   ,SLR.name;
GO


/* My Securables */
SELECT
    PermissionName  = SP.permission_name
   ,PermissionState = SP.state_desc
FROM
    master.sys.server_permissions       AS SP
INNER JOIN master.sys.server_principals AS P ON SP.grantee_principal_id = P.principal_id
WHERE
    P.name = SUSER_NAME()
ORDER BY
    SP.permission_name
   ,SP.state_desc;
GO


/* My Granted Database Permissions */
SELECT
    PermissionName  = DP.permission_name
   ,PermissionState = DP.state_desc
   ,ObjectName      = O.name
   ,ObjectType      = O.type_desc
FROM
    sys.database_permissions       AS DP
LEFT JOIN sys.objects              AS O ON DP.major_id             = O.object_id
INNER JOIN sys.database_principals AS P ON DP.grantee_principal_id = P.principal_id
WHERE
    P.name = USER_NAME()
ORDER BY
    DP.permission_name
   ,DP.state_desc;
GO


/* My Assigned Database Roles - User Mapping */
SELECT
    RoleName   = R.name
   ,MemberName = M.name
FROM
    sys.database_role_members      AS DRM
INNER JOIN sys.database_principals AS R ON DRM.role_principal_id   = R.principal_id
INNER JOIN sys.database_principals AS M ON DRM.member_principal_id = M.principal_id
WHERE
    M.name = USER_NAME()
ORDER BY
    R.name
   ,M.name;
GO


/* My Schema-Level Permissions */
SELECT
    PermissionName  = DP.permission_name
   ,PermissionState = DP.state_desc
   ,SchemaName      = S.name
FROM
    sys.database_permissions AS DP
JOIN sys.schemas             AS S ON DP.major_id             = S.schema_id
JOIN sys.database_principals AS P ON DP.grantee_principal_id = P.principal_id
WHERE
    P.name = USER_NAME()
ORDER BY
    DP.permission_name
   ,DP.state_desc
   ,S.name;
GO


/* All Database Users */
SELECT
    Username = name
   ,type_desc
   ,create_date
   ,modify_date
FROM
    sys.database_principals
WHERE
    type_desc NOT IN ('DATABASE_ROLE')
AND sid IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    Username;
GO


/* All Role Members */
SELECT
    DatabaseRoleName = R.name
   ,DatabaseUserName = ISNULL(U.name, 'No members')
FROM
    sys.database_principals         AS R
LEFT JOIN sys.database_role_members AS M ON R.principal_id        = M.role_principal_id
LEFT JOIN sys.database_principals   AS U ON M.member_principal_id = U.principal_id
WHERE
    R.type = 'R'
ORDER BY
    R.name;
GO


/* All Logins (SQL and Windows) with Server Roles and Disabled Status */
SELECT
    LoginName   = SP.name
   ,LoginType   = SP.type_desc
   ,IsDisabled  = SP.is_disabled
   ,ServerRoles = ISNULL(STUFF((
                                   SELECT
                                       ', ' + SR.name
                                   FROM
                                       sys.server_role_members AS SRM
                                   JOIN sys.server_principals  AS SR ON SRM.role_principal_id = SR.principal_id
                                   WHERE
                                       SRM.member_principal_id = SP.principal_id
                                   FOR XML PATH(''), TYPE
                               ).value('.', 'NVARCHAR(MAX)')
                            ,1
                            ,2
                            ,''
                         )
                     ,'No Roles'
                  )
   ,SP.create_date
   ,SP.modify_date
FROM
    master.sys.server_principals         AS SP
LEFT JOIN master.sys.server_role_members AS SRM ON SP.principal_id       = SRM.member_principal_id
LEFT JOIN master.sys.server_principals   AS SRP ON SRM.role_principal_id = SRP.principal_id
WHERE
    SP.type_desc IN ('SQL_LOGIN', 'WINDOWS_LOGIN', 'WINDOWS_GROUP')
ORDER BY
    LoginName;
GO


/* All Groups a User is Member of */
EXECUTE master.sys.xp_logininfo @acctname = 'CORP\WindowsUser', @option = 'all';
GO


/* All Users in Group */
EXECUTE master.sys.xp_logininfo @acctname = 'CORP\WindowsGroup', @option = 'members';
GO


/* List all Users and Users in Login Groups */
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #DomainAccount;
CREATE TABLE #DomainAccount (
    [account name]      sysname     NOT NULL
   ,type                varchar(10) NOT NULL
   ,privilege           varchar(10) NOT NULL
   ,[mapped login name] sysname     NOT NULL
   ,[permission path]   sysname     NOT NULL
);

DECLARE @GroupName sysname;

DECLARE DomainGroups CURSOR LOCAL FAST_FORWARD FOR
    SELECT name FROM master.sys.server_principals WHERE type = 'G' AND name NOT LIKE 'NT%';

OPEN DomainGroups;
FETCH NEXT FROM DomainGroups
INTO
    @GroupName;

WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
    BEGIN
        INSERT INTO #DomainAccount ([account name], type, privilege, [mapped login name], [permission path])
        EXEC master.sys.xp_logininfo @acctname = @GroupName, @option = 'members';
        FETCH NEXT FROM DomainGroups
        INTO
            @GroupName;
    END;
CLOSE DomainGroups;
DEALLOCATE DomainGroups;

SELECT
    [Mapped Login Name] = da.[mapped login name]
   ,LoginName           = u.name
   ,LoginType           = u.type_desc
   ,RoleName            = r.name
   ,AccountType         = da.type
FROM
    master.sys.server_principals          AS r
INNER JOIN master.sys.server_role_members AS rm ON r.principal_id        = rm.role_principal_id
INNER JOIN master.sys.server_principals   AS u ON rm.member_principal_id = u.principal_id
LEFT JOIN #DomainAccount                  AS da ON u.name                = da.[permission path]
WHERE
    r.type = 'R'
AND u.type <> 'R'
ORDER BY
    da.[mapped login name]
   ,r.principal_id
   ,u.type_desc
   ,u.name;
GO


/* All Role Permissions */
SELECT
    PrincipalName   = R.name
   ,PrincipalType   = R.type_desc
   ,GrantedBy       = ISNULL(G.name, 'System')
   ,PermissionName  = P.permission_name
   ,PermissionState = P.state_desc
   ,ObjectName      = ISNULL(O.name, 'N/A')
   ,ObjectType      = ISNULL(O.type_desc, 'N/A')
FROM
    sys.database_permissions      AS P
LEFT JOIN sys.objects             AS O ON P.major_id             = O.object_id
LEFT JOIN sys.database_principals AS R ON P.grantee_principal_id = R.principal_id
LEFT JOIN sys.database_principals AS G ON P.grantor_principal_id = G.principal_id
WHERE
    R.type_desc = 'DATABASE_ROLE'
AND R.name NOT IN ('public')
ORDER BY
    R.name
   ,P.permission_name;
GO


/* Stored Procedure Permissions */
SELECT
    SchemaName          = S.name
   ,StoredProcedureName = O.name
   ,PermissionState     = DP.state_desc
   ,PermissionName      = DP.permission_name
   ,GranteeName         = P.name
FROM
    sys.database_permissions      AS DP
INNER JOIN sys.objects            AS O ON DP.major_id             = O.object_id
INNER JOIN sys.schemas            AS S ON O.schema_id             = S.schema_id
LEFT JOIN sys.database_principals AS P ON DP.grantee_principal_id = P.principal_id
WHERE
    O.type = 'P'
ORDER BY
    SchemaName
   ,StoredProcedureName
   ,GranteeName
   ,PermissionName;
GO


/* Schema Permissions */
SELECT
    SchemaName      = S.name
   ,PermissionState = DP.state_desc
   ,PermissionName  = DP.permission_name
   ,UserName        = U.name
FROM
    sys.database_permissions      AS DP
LEFT JOIN sys.objects             AS O ON DP.major_id             = O.object_id
LEFT JOIN sys.schemas             AS S ON DP.major_id             = S.schema_id
LEFT JOIN sys.database_principals AS U ON DP.grantee_principal_id = U.principal_id
WHERE
    DP.class_desc = 'SCHEMA'
ORDER BY
    SchemaName
   ,PermissionName
   ,UserName;
GO


/* Schema, Object, or Column Permission */
SELECT
    Permission     = 'GRANT'
   ,PermissionName = +perm.permission_name
   ,Class          = perm.class_desc
   ,ObjectName     = CASE perm.class_desc
                         WHEN 'SCHEMA'
                             THEN SCHEMA_NAME(perm.major_id)
                         WHEN 'OBJECT_OR_COLUMN'
                             THEN CASE WHEN perm.minor_id = 0
                                           THEN OBJECT_NAME(perm.major_id)
                                      ELSE (
                                      SELECT name FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = perm.major_id AND column_id = perm.minor_id
                                  )
                                  END
                         ELSE 'other'
                     END
   ,ColumnName     = CASE WHEN perm.class_desc = 'OBJECT_OR_COLUMN'
                          AND perm.minor_id > 0
                              THEN (
                              SELECT name FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = perm.major_id AND column_id = perm.minor_id
                          )
                         ELSE NULL
                     END
   ,GrantedTo      = prin.name
FROM
    sys.database_permissions       AS perm
INNER JOIN sys.database_principals AS prin ON perm.grantee_principal_id = prin.principal_id
LEFT JOIN sys.objects              AS o ON o.object_id                  = perm.major_id
WHERE
    perm.major_id > 0
AND perm.permission_name IN ('SELECT', 'INSERT', 'UPDATE', 'DELETE');
GO


/* Table & View Permissions */
SELECT
    SchemaName      = S.name
   ,ObjectName      = O.name
   ,ObjectType      = O.type_desc
   ,UserName        = U.name
   ,PermissionState = DP.state_desc
   ,PermissionName  = DP.permission_name
FROM
    sys.database_permissions      AS DP
LEFT JOIN sys.objects             AS O ON DP.major_id             = O.object_id
LEFT JOIN sys.schemas             AS S ON O.schema_id             = S.schema_id
LEFT JOIN sys.database_principals AS U ON DP.grantee_principal_id = U.principal_id
WHERE
    O.type IN ('U', 'V')
AND DP.class_desc = 'OBJECT_OR_COLUMN'
AND U.name NOT IN ('public')
ORDER BY
    SchemaName
   ,ObjectName
   ,UserName
   ,PermissionName
   ,PermissionState;
GO


/**********************************************************************************************************************
** Find SQL Server Logins and Database Users
**********************************************************************************************************************/
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #Names;
CREATE TABLE #Names (Name sysname NOT NULL);

INSERT INTO #Names (Name)
VALUES (N'PersonName1')
   ,(N'PersonName2')
   ,(N'ActiveDirectorSecurityGroupName1')
   ,(N'ActiveDirectorSecurityGroupName2');

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #ExcludeDatabases;
CREATE TABLE #ExcludeDatabases (DatabaseName sysname NOT NULL);

INSERT INTO #ExcludeDatabases (DatabaseName) VALUES (N'DatabaseName1'), (N'DatabaseName2');

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #Matches;

CREATE TABLE #Matches (
    MatchType           varchar(20)   NOT NULL
   ,ScopeName           sysname       NOT NULL
   ,PrincipalName       sysname       NOT NULL
   ,PrincipalType       nvarchar(60)  NOT NULL
   ,PrincipalId         int           NULL
   ,Sid                 varbinary(85) NULL
   ,DefaultDatabaseName sysname       NULL
   ,CreateDate          datetime2(0)  NULL
   ,ModifyDate          datetime2(0)  NULL
);

INSERT INTO #Matches (
    MatchType, ScopeName, PrincipalName, PrincipalType, PrincipalId, Sid, DefaultDatabaseName, CreateDate, ModifyDate
)
SELECT
    MatchType           = 'LOGIN'
   ,ScopeName           = N'(server)'
   ,PrincipalName       = sp.name
   ,PrincipalType       = sp.type_desc
   ,PrincipalId         = sp.principal_id
   ,Sid                 = sp.sid
   ,DefaultDatabaseName = sp.default_database_name
   ,CreateDate          = sp.create_date
   ,ModifyDate          = sp.modify_date
FROM
    sys.server_principals AS sp
WHERE
    sp.type IN ('S', 'U', 'G', 'E', 'X')
AND sp.name NOT LIKE N'##%'
AND EXISTS (
        SELECT
            1
        FROM
            #Names AS n
        WHERE
            sp.name COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT LIKE N'%' + n.Name COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT + N'%'
    );

DECLARE @Sql nvarchar(MAX) = N'';

SELECT
    @Sql = @Sql
           + N'
INSERT INTO #Matches
(
    MatchType
   ,ScopeName
   ,PrincipalName
   ,PrincipalType
   ,PrincipalId
   ,Sid
   ,DefaultDatabaseName
   ,CreateDate
   ,ModifyDate
)
SELECT
    MatchType               = ''USER''
   ,ScopeName               = N' + QUOTENAME(d.name, '''')
           + N'
   ,PrincipalName           = dp.name
   ,PrincipalType           = dp.type_desc
   ,PrincipalId             = dp.principal_id
   ,Sid                     = dp.sid
   ,DefaultDatabaseName     = CAST(NULL AS sysname)
   ,CreateDate              = dp.create_date
   ,ModifyDate              = dp.modify_date
FROM '     + QUOTENAME(d.name)
           + N'.sys.database_principals AS dp
WHERE dp.type IN (''S'',''U'',''G'',''E'',''X'')
  AND dp.principal_id > 4
  AND EXISTS
  (
      SELECT
          1
      FROM
          #Names AS n
      WHERE
          dp.name COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT LIKE N''%'' + n.Name COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT + N''%''
  );'
FROM
    sys.databases AS d
WHERE
    d.state_desc = 'ONLINE'
--AND d.database_id > 4
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM #ExcludeDatabases AS ed WHERE ed.DatabaseName = d.name);

EXEC sys.sp_executesql @Sql;

SELECT
    MatchType
   ,PrincipalName
   ,ScopeName
   ,PrincipalType
   /* ,PrincipalId */
   /* ,Sid */
   /* ,DefaultDatabaseName */
   ,CreateDate
   ,ModifyDate
FROM
    #Matches
ORDER BY
    MatchType
   ,PrincipalName
   ,ScopeName;
GO


/* Find Active Directory Users and Groups Enabled/Disabled Status with PowerShell. */
 
  DECLARE @UsersBlock nvarchar(MAX);
  DECLARE @Template nvarchar(MAX);
  
  SELECT
      @UsersBlock = N'$Users = @(' + CHAR(13) + CHAR(10) + ISNULL(STUFF((
      SELECT
          CHAR(13) + CHAR(10) + CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY sys.server_principals.name) = 1
                                         THEN N'    ''' + REPLACE(sys.server_principals.name, N'''', N'''''') + N''''
                                    ELSE N'    ,''' + REPLACE(sys.server_principals.name, N'''', N'''''') + N''''
                                END
      FROM
          sys.server_principals
      WHERE
          sys.server_principals.type_desc IN (N'WINDOWS_LOGIN', N'WINDOWS_GROUP')
      AND sys.server_principals.name LIKE N'%\%'
      AND sys.server_principals.name NOT LIKE N'NT AUTHORITY\%'
      AND sys.server_principals.name NOT LIKE N'NT SERVICE\%'
      AND sys.server_principals.name NOT LIKE N'BUILTIN\%'
      ORDER BY
          sys.server_principals.name
      FOR XML PATH(N''), TYPE
  )                                                                     .value(N'.', N'nvarchar(max)')
                                                                     ,1
                                                                     ,2
                                                                     ,N''
                                                                  )
                                                              ,N'    '
                                                           ) + CHAR(13) + CHAR(10) + N')';
  
  SET @Template = N'__USERS_BLOCK__
  
  $Results = foreach ($DomainPrincipal in $Users) {
      $Sam = $DomainPrincipal.Split(''\'')[-1]
  
      try {
          $Searcher = New-Object System.DirectoryServices.DirectorySearcher
          $Searcher.Filter = "(sAMAccountName=$Sam)"
          $null = $Searcher.PropertiesToLoad.Add(''samaccountname'')
          $null = $Searcher.PropertiesToLoad.Add(''distinguishedname'')
          $null = $Searcher.PropertiesToLoad.Add(''objectcategory'')
          $null = $Searcher.PropertiesToLoad.Add(''useraccountcontrol'')
  
          $Result = $Searcher.FindOne()
  
          if ($null -ne $Result) {
              $ObjectCategory = $null
  
              if ($Result.Properties[''objectcategory''].Count -gt 0) {
                  $ObjectCategory = [string]$Result.Properties[''objectcategory''][0]
              }
  
              $IsGroup = $ObjectCategory -like ''*CN=Group*''
              $IsUser = (-not $IsGroup)
  
              if ($IsUser) {
                  $Uac = 0
  
                  if ($Result.Properties[''useraccountcontrol''].Count -gt 0) {
                      $Uac = [int]$Result.Properties[''useraccountcontrol''][0]
                  }
  
                  $Disabled = (($Uac -band 2) -ne 0)
  
                  [pscustomobject]@{
                      InputName         = $DomainPrincipal
                      SamAccountName    = $Result.Properties[''samaccountname''][0]
                      ADObjectType      = ''User''
                      Status            = if ($Disabled) { ''Disabled'' } else { ''Enabled'' }
                      DistinguishedName = $Result.Properties[''distinguishedname''][0]
                  }
              }
              else {
                  [pscustomobject]@{
                      InputName         = $DomainPrincipal
                      SamAccountName    = $Result.Properties[''samaccountname''][0]
                      ADObjectType      = ''Group''
                      Status            = ''Exists (no enabled state)''
                      DistinguishedName = $Result.Properties[''distinguishedname''][0]
                  }
              }
          }
          else {
              [pscustomobject]@{
                  InputName         = $DomainPrincipal
                  SamAccountName    = $Sam
                  ADObjectType      = $null
                  Status            = ''Not found''
                  DistinguishedName = $null
              }
          }
      }
      catch {
          [pscustomobject]@{
              InputName         = $DomainPrincipal
              SamAccountName    = $Sam
              ADObjectType      = $null
              Status            = ''Lookup error''
              DistinguishedName = $null
          }
      }
  }
  
  $Results | Format-Table -AutoSize';
  
  SELECT [text()] = REPLACE(@Template, N'__USERS_BLOCK__', @UsersBlock)FOR XML PATH(N''), TYPE; 
GO
